title: Deadly Duck
description: A chaotic survival modpack, now on Fabric. More deadly, more fun!
body:
![smp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8a46bba645597f2360ad3426d29638a577697fd.png)





🔥~~**Deadly Duck 2.0** ~~🔥

Now on Fabric and More Dangerous Than Ever!

The chaos returns. Deadly Duck has evolved  rebuilt from the ground up on Fabric for smoother performance, better compatibility, and even more unpredictable mayhem.

Whether you’re a modded Minecraft veteran or a first-time chaos explorer, this pack delivers a thrilling, handcrafted survival experience where anything and everything can go wrong.

🧨 What’s New in 2.0?

✅ Fabric-Powered Performance – Lightweight, faster, and more mod-friendly.

✅ Overhauled Mod Selection – Better balance, smarter progression, and wild new content.

✅ Harder, Weirder, Deadlier – Expect strange mobs, broken rules, and moments that make you ask: why is this happening?

✅ Frequent Updates – Ongoing tweaks and content drops based on player feedback.

🧠 Designed for:

Players who love surprises (and suffering)

Chaos-driven adventures

Modpack creators and explorers who want something different

[Update 2.9.2.0](https://youtu.be/cBkI07FeZhU)
